REGIONVIS.LinkedTokenUuidHint: UUID of the token that controls this region's visibility. Only players who select this token will see the region.
REGIONVIS.HideFromGMHint: If enabled, the region is also hidden from the GM when the linked token is not selected. By default the GM always sees all regions.
REGIONVIS.GridSizeHint: Number of cells per side of the visibility range grid. Default is 10 (a 10×10 grid). Changing this resets stored patterns — existing tokens keep their saved grid data until reconfigured.
REGIONVIS.KeybindModifiersHint: Modifier keys combined with V to toggle the visibility range region. Change here if the default conflicts with other modules.
REGIONVIS.RangeHint: Click cells to define the visibility range shape. Active cells (orange) will form a polygon region around the token when toggled via keybind. The darker centre cell marks the token's position.
REGIONVIS.KeybindHint: Create or remove the visibility-range polygon region for the currently selected token.
REGIONVIS.GMOnly: Only the GM can create or remove visibility range regions.
REGIONVIS.SelectToken: Select a token first before toggling the visibility range.
REGIONVIS.NoPattern: No visibility range pattern set for this token. Open token configuration and define a pattern on the Visibility Range grid.
REGIONVIS.NoVertices: The selected cells do not form a valid polygon (need at least 3 boundary vertices). Select more cells.
REGIONVIS.RegionFailed: Failed to create region. The operation may have been cancelled or the scene is not editable.
REGIONVIS.RegionNotFound: Tracked region no longer exists. Flag cleaned up. Press keybind again to create a new one.
REGIONVIS.PresetNameRequired: Please enter a name for the preset.
REGIONVIS.PresetNoCells: Select at least one cell in the grid before saving.
REGIONVIS.PresetDeleteConfirm: Delete preset "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
REGIONVIS.PresetListEmpty: No presets saved yet. Design a pattern in the Token Configuration and click "Save as Preset".
REGIONVIS.PresetNotFound: Preset not found. It may have been deleted.
REGIONVIS.PresetMacroCreated: Macro "{name}" created. Drag it to your hotbar.
REGIONVIS.MacroAlreadyExists: A macro named "{name}" already exists. Delete or rename the existing macro first.
REGIONVIS.OpenPresetListKeybindHint: Open the Range Presets management window to browse, edit, and create macros for saved range presets.
REGIONVIS.ClearAllRegionsKeybindHint: Delete every tracked region (main range + all presets) for the currently selected token.
REGIONVIS.NoRegionsToClear: No tracked regions to clear on this token.
